name: permitiq-boston
description: PermitIQ Boston — AI-powered Boston building permit advisor

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm start"
scripts.setup: cp server/.env.example server/.env && echo 'Add your ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to server/.env'
